name: Kanna - Watermelon juice
description:
🍉😋

Hot day of August, and you decided to spend some time at the beach to escape from the scorching heat. Just when you were about to get in the water, a girl running by the shore bumps onto you, and though she's not really tall the collission was enough to make you fall back. That's when you realize... it's not a girl, or at least, not the girl you'd expect. You've never seen a plant with more curves than this one. Luckily for you, she may have a way to make it up to you and help you deal with the heat. Who wouldn't love a nice tropical drink?

Hey there. Really hot today huh? Well, sorry cause this bot is gonna heat you up even more.

Really small bot and kinda lazy, I didn't have much to put in the description of this bot since there's not much info of her out there. Hope you like it still.

Another request done.

Art by Goatboydraws
